image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about clock genes PER than social media does.
Context visual: Clock genes, like PER, regulate our daily rhythms. But what does that really mean?
Escalation visual: These genes influence sleep, metabolism, and even mood. Surprising, right?
Evidence visual: Studies show disruptions in PER can lead to serious health issues. There’s more at stake than you think.
Payoff visual: Understanding these genes empowers us to improve our well-being. It’s a game changer!
Cta visual: Curious about your own clock genes? Hit like and follow for more science insights!
